# ANALYSIS: Combined 4-gate Stage-1 backtest

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** analysis
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Stacking the four deployed quality gates (ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE, V14E_BEAR_TIME_OF_DAY_GATE, MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE, RIBBON_MOMENTUM_GATE) will preserve or improve edge_capture on J's source-of-truth anchor days while reducing losing-day losses, maintaining edge_capture >= 771.

## Mechanism

Each gate filters entries based on specific conditions: ORB narrow range and long-only, V14E bear time-of-day elevation, midday trendline block, ribbon momentum filter. Combined, they are applied as sequential filters in the engine; entry only passes if all gates allow.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline
2. **Sample bias:** Stage-1 backtest uses 16-month SPY 5m data (Jan 2025-Apr 2026); selection method is all days; overfit risk mitigated by walk-forward and real-fills checks.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (combined gate OOS/IS ratio not yet computed)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (real-fills on top 3 J days not yet performed)
5. **Failure modes:** worst day could be a J winner day blocked by gates turning it into a loss; max drawdown scenario if gates cause multiple consecutive losses; blow-up scenario if gates inadvertently allow large losses on loser days.
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest to see if top-5 days concentration changes.

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators must pass for all gates; walk-forward OOS/IS ratio >= 0.5; real-fills on top 3 J days within ±20% of simulated P&L; edge_capture >= 771.

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- low confidence due to lack of combined backtest data; individual gates show promise but interactions unknown.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not conflict with existing candidates; it evaluates the combined effect of already-deployed gates (ranks 4,17,21,22). If the combined backtest shows edge_capture >= 771, it validates the stacked gates; otherwise, may require gate tuning or removal.
